Speed Kills
programme.desc: Wealthy speedboat racer Ben Aronoff leads a secret life that lands him in trouble with both law enforcement and drug lords.

programme.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
programme.desc: Charlie, a 15-year-old introvert, enters high school and is nervous about his new life. When he befriends his seniors, he learns to cope with his friend's suicide and his tumultuous past.

programme.title: Revolutionary Road
programme.desc: A near-perfect couple decides to transfer to Paris in order to escape their satiated lives. But their relationship starts to strain when the woman's pregnancy forces them to change their plan.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Somali pirates attack the Maersk Alabama, a container ship, while it is on its course to Kenya. Richard Phillips, the captain of the ship, uses his wits to negotiate with them to save his crew.

programme.title: The Runner
programme.desc: A politician's life is thrown into turmoil when a scandal emerges. His team scrambles to save his reputation and mitigate the damage.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: When a man with HIV is fired by his law firm because of his condition, he hires a homophobic small-time lawyer as the only willing advocate for a wrongful dismissal suit.

programme.title: The Family Fang
programme.desc: After the police inform them about their parents' mysterious disappearance, two siblings embark on a mission to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Sabotage
programme.desc: John Wharton, the captain of an elite task force, raids a safe house owned by one of the most lethal drug cartels with his team. Though the mission is successful, death awaits them.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Reginald's manager helps him rise to fame, but also creates chaos in his life.

programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. programme.desc: Yanzu assaults Shikeng, prompting Weimin to treat Ma Yixiang’s injuries in exchange for the charges being dropped. Meanwhile, Jinju suffers a stroke, causing Jingzhi to break down under the pressure of caregiving.

programme.desc: The X-Fold Exercise Bike is a compact, foldable exercise bike designed for small spaces, offering adjustable resistance, an LCD display and Mobile App connectivity for your workout. Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions.

programme.title: 100% Wife - EP 8 / 金家好媳妇
programme.desc: Qiuyi has done the chores given by Xiaoli. Huiping praises Qiuyi, which makes Xiaoli feel threatened. Xinru finds the door unlocked and thinks that there is a burglar in the house.

programme.title: 100% Wife - EP 9 / 金家好媳妇
programme.desc: When Guanting learns that the construction site has been dumped with waste, he rushes there but is threatened by Brother Bao. A drunken Zhenghui asks Qiuyi for money and beats her up when he can't get any.

programme.title: The Heir to the Throne - EP 2 / 家族荣耀之继承者
programme.desc: On her first day as acting chairperson, Haoer is framed for bribery and forgery, but with the help of Gao Jun and Shouren, the charges are dropped. Haoer returns just in time to stop the casino project vote.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 519 / 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: Heroes in White - EP 25 / 侠医
programme.desc: Weimin reopens his clinic and starts afresh as a physician. While Yingchen suffers foot pain during a pharmacy inspection, Weimin cares for her by preparing new shoes, which makes Qiting feel jealous.

programme.title: From YES to I DO - EP 2 / Hay我们结婚乐!
programme.desc: For the new generation, cohabitation before marriage and December romances are no surprise. Hazelle and James’ sweet moments are so cheesy even their families can’t take it! As marriage nears, friends step in with past love stories, tears and support. But with wedding prep in full swing, mishaps keep happening, and a surprise date leaves Hazelle frustrated with James.

programme.title: Hipster Tour - Tasmania - EP 2 / 塔斯曼尼亚潮什么
programme.desc: Christy visits a wildlife sanctuary, getting up close with wombats, kangaroos, and echidnas, and is charmed by their adorable nature. programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 2 / 金式森林
programme.desc: After the car accident, Fang Yangtian’s fate remains unknown. To stabilize Fang International’s share price and prevent their grandmother from worrying, the three brothers decide to keep news of their father’s coma under wraps.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight / 晚间新闻

programme.desc: Saiful, budak lelaki berusia 9 tahun menyembunyikan rahsia besar di mana ibunya telah pun meninggal dunia di dalam bilik selama sebulan.

programme.title: Pisau Cukur
programme.desc: Apa jadi bila mangsa dan pemangsa terperangkap di kapal mewah? Bella & Intan bertembung 3 Datuk, isteri, anak, seorang detektif dan peminat tegar Bella. Siapa mangsa, siapa pemangsa?

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: The story involves Maverick confronting his past while training a group of younger Top Gun graduates, including the son of his deceased best friend, for a dangerous mission.

programme.title: 10 Tips Tipu Bini
programme.desc: Apabila 3 pengarah kreatif di syarikat pengiklanan cuba memikat 3 gadis intern yang bekerja di syarikat mereka untuk dijadikan kekasih, mereka terpaksa menipu isteri mereka untuk melaksanakan niat mereka.

programme.title: Suara Kekasih (HD)
programme.desc: Kisah percintaan terhalang dan terlarang di antara seorang artis dengan seorang pemuda dari keluarga berada. Lakonan Fauziah Ahmad Daud, Azmil Mustapha, Norlida Ahmad (Connie) dan Datin Rosnani Jamil.

programme.title: Walid Ep01
programme.desc: Ditahan kerana ajaran sesat, Walid meloloskan diri dari serang hendap ganas. Saat pengikut ditangkap dan disoal, kesetiaan retak—dan pelindung misteri muncul dari bayang.

programme.title: AstroBiz Mencari Kedai Lejen: Rezeky Tomyam
programme.desc: Mencari Kedai Lejen ialah siri dokumentari yang mengangkat kisah pemilik F&B tempatan. Dua restoran, dua menu berlainan, berkongsi satu legasi kisah Aunty T's serta Rezeky Tomyam, dedikasi dan pengorbanan.

programme.title: Maria Mariana
programme.desc: Maria dan Mariana dua adik beradik yang mempunyai perwatakan berbeza berdepan dengan konflik kehidupan dan percintaaan. Lakonan Erra Fazira dan Ziana Zain

programme.title: Bikers Kental
programme.desc: Kisah Bidin Al Zaifa dan abang sepupunya Aidil Al Zaifa yang berkonvoi bersama geng motosikal Eddie Cuardo ke Thailand yang penuh dengan pelbagai kisah, tragedi dan konflik di antara Bidin, Eddie dan Saiya Sukhaporn serta Cherry Porntit.

programme.title: Walid Ep02
programme.desc: Walid terjerat pakatan dengan Habiburrahman yang berkarisma. Saat cita-cita memuncak di pergunungan, Ummi bangkit menuntut semula Jihad Ummah—walau terpaksa menjadi apa yang dulu ditentangnya.

programme.title: Cikgu Timah Sekolah Bandar

Pelbagai konflik telah berlaku dalam rumah tangga cikgu Timah. Haziq anak tirinya berusaha untuk memulihkan hubungan cikgu Timah serta ayahnya Imran.

programme.desc: Ustazah Aishah is offered a chance to travel on Kapal Haji (steamship to Hajj) is faced with a dilemma when the villagers question her ability to lead the pilgrims. Inspector Jumaat's efforts to stop a scam of the villager's pilgrimage savings put him in a difficult position, leading to series of challenges.

programme.title: Setulus Hati - EP 29
programme.desc: Setulus Hati tells the story of a pilot and flight attendant, Alvino and Rossa. Their marriage looks perfect and harmonious. But apparently, the presence of Lia, who is Rossa's best friend, actually becomes a thorn in Rossa and Alvino's marriage.

programme.title: Rayakustika 2025
programme.desc: In this AidilAdha variety special, we embark on a heartfelt journey inspired by the concept of Journey/Hijrah—a path of transformation, faith, and perseverance. programme.title: HeistDilAdha

programme.title: Home Ideas - EP 11
programme.desc: This program is perfect for those of you who are and want to build a house, especially one that has a minimalist size. programme.title: Calon Isteri Buat Suami - EP 14

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Carisi must tread carefully when Maxwell's husband becomes a person of interest in an SVU investigation; Benson sends Velasco to take an old friend into custody.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A cryptic message sends SVU on a new track to find Maddie; Benson tries to help a federal agent when the case hits too close to home; Capt. Curry tries to make amends with Fin.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Agent Sykes struggles to cope on the anniversary of her sister's disappearance; Benson suspects a cold case from Manhattan could help her get closure.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Agent Clay consults with Benson when a woman is found gravely injured at a remote campground and the suspect could be anywhere along the Eastern Seaboard; Bruno and Silva take a chance on an odd hunch to see if it becomes a lead.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A sexual assault victim (guest star Tracy Pollan) helps detectives investigate the activities of a rape suspect (guest star Neil Maffin).

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an 8-year-old beauty queen's body is found in a suitcase on a Manhattan bus, detectives hunt for a pedophile with a fetish for pageants.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives suspect several young socialites of raping a girl at a Manhattan nightclub, then killing her.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A quiet night is shattered when intruders terrorize a Florida couple and their young son, killing one of them; investigators question the initial story; a tip leads them to another family with dark secrets, and that's when bonds are tested.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: The discovery of a 19-year-old's car abandoned on a bridge in New Jersey turns into a missing person case that evolves into a homicide investigation; police discover a plot involving money, close friends and a betrayal.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: The discovery of a 19-year-old's car abandoned on a bridge in New Jersey turns into a missing person case that evolves into a months long homicide investigation; police discover a plot involving money, close friends and a fatal betrayal.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The undercover investigation of an arms dealer is interrupted when terrorists take over the suspect's office building and Callen is taken hostage.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Sam and Callen are sent to retrieve key evidence after a U.S. Ambassador (Julie Chen) narrowly escapes a terrorist attack.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: In hope of identifying the source of an anthrax poisoning before it can be used as a weapon, Sam and Callen go undercover as food truck owners.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a missing 5-year-old boy is found dead, suspicion falls on his unstable 13-year-old neighbor, whose mental problems began after he was abused at a camp recommended by the dead child's father.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson suspect a sugar daddy (Matt C. Burns) of murder when a young woman's body is found stuffed inside a suitcase.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives Stabler and Benson investigate the murder and dismemberment of a cabdriver who was a wanted man.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler run into multiple dead ends while investigating the case of a woman who fell to her death wearing only a slip.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives Benson and Stabler believe a fellow cop may be behind murders going back 30 years; Munch is in rare form during a child molestation case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler believe a pedophile (John Dossett) may be behind the murder of a travel writer, especially after meeting the victim's landlady and her streetwise daughter (Patricia Richardson, Lynn Collins).

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The state pursues a media-sensationalized case against a known pedophile who's suspected of assaulting and killing a youth.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.desc: Detectives Benson and Stabler investigate the shooting death of a sleazy judge who abused the criminal-justice system.

A series of ransomware threats leads to emergencies for the 118, including a helicopter crash at a hospital and an air traffic control tower system failure; the case of the realtor serial rapist goes to trial.
The 118 springs into action when a citywide blackout and a record heat wave causes mayhem in Los Angeles; Chimney confides in Hen about Maddie's condition; Athena's worst nightmare comes true.

As the citywide blackout continues to cause mayhem in Los Angeles, Athena races to save her family from a tragedy; Eddie must make a difficult choice about his future; Maddie makes a life-changing decision.

A truck crashes into a high school homecoming parade; Athena and Michael try to help Harry in the aftermath of his kidnapping; May is intimidated by a returning call center legend; Bobby gives a devastated Chimney advice regarding Maddie.
A man over-exerts himself exercising; a groundskeeper is cut by his chainsaw; an explosion occurs at a retirement community; May gets an emergency call from a suicidal teen.
Responding to a fire at a prison, Bobby and the 118 find themselves trapped in a deadly riot.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Greg Focker, a hapless American nurse, ends up like a hamster on a wheel of misadventures in a desperate attempt to win the favour of his girlfriend's parents.

programme.title: P.S. I Love You
programme.desc: A young woman loses her husband to an illness. However, her life takes a turn when she learns that he has left her some messages to ease her pain.

programme.title: Kung Fu Yoga
programme.desc: An archeology expert joins an Indian professor to look for a lost treasure of India. However, things take a dangerous turn when they are ambushed in their quest.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Ben Whittaker, a 70-year-old widower, realises that he is not cut out for retirement. He then applies to become a senior intern for a sceptical boss at an online fashion site.

programme.title: What's Love Got to Do with It?
programme.desc: Filmmaker Zoe Stevenson documents her Pakistani best friend's journey to an arranged marriage. Over time, the process begins to make her challenge her own attitudes towards relationships.

programme.title: Yes Man
programme.desc: Carl, a lonely man with low self-esteem, participates in a self-help programme that challenges him to say yes to everything in life for an entire year.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: Sports agent Jerry Maguire tries to get back on his feet after being fired from his job. However, the only client he has is Rod Tidwell, a disgruntled football player who wants a better contract.

programme.title: The Great Dictator
programme.desc: After suffering from memory loss, a soldier returns to his former profession as a barber and attempts to escape persecution by the military forces.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace, who is vacationing in Paris with her friends and stepsister, is mistaken for a British heiress. Later, the three women are whisked away to Monte Carlo, where they discover royalty and romance.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: THE SULTAN EMPIRE
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a talk show featuring King Sultan Andre Taulany and Prince Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a cast of hilarious royal guards. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Aaa Kasian Aaa Kesengsem Sama Idolaaa
programme.desc: Vivian (Ersya Aurelia) accidentally collides with Erdin Werdrayana. Erdin turns out to be an idol adored by many women and pursued by his fans because of his good looks.

programme.title: Masa Mantan Koki Bisa Bikin Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Daniel asks Siska (Ersya Aurelia) to learn how to cook because his family owns a restaurant, and his mother stipulates that his wife must be a good cook. Siska eventually enlists the help of Bobby (Kevin Hillers), her ex, who is a chef and owns a culinary business.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day, while Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend, Rangga (Joshua Otay), with another woman. Dania was shocked, not expecting her boyfriend to be cheating on her with another woman behind her back. Afterward, Dania reflected alone in a park. She said she wished someone had given her a hug when she was so vulnerable.

programme.title: Cewek Jetset Kadang Bikin Wah Kadang Hah
programme.desc: One day, Alexa (Nabila Zavira) meets Darman (Erdin Werdrayana). Feeling comfortable, Alexa complains about her father's lack of attention. Darman also complains about his family's financial situation, which is in dire need of money. Alexa suddenly has an idea: Darman kidnaps Alexa and demands a ransom from her father.
